caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a small bow tie, glasses, and a tall, grey, stylized wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him, the wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including a black garment on a mannequin. To his right, a black tufted chair is partially visible. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left featuring a microphone icon and the text "PODCAST" below "STALBO", as well as a logo on the right that reads "BOSS TALK JOY" with "PODCAST" appearing beneath it. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expressions and slightly moving his mouth as he continues to speak.
